prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large gray metal cube
  - obj_2: small green metal cube
  - obj_3: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_4: small red metal cube
  - obj_5: large brown metal cube
  - obj_6: small brown metal sphere
  - obj_7: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large cyan rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0201] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0202] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0203] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0204] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0205] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0206] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0207] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0208] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0209] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0210] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0211] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0212] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0213] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0214] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0215] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0216] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0217] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0218] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0219] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0220] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in each image to compare distances.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and their approximate 3D positions:

- obj_0: purple rubber sphere (center-left area)
- obj_1: gray metal cube (front-center or back)
- obj_2: green metal cube (center)
- obj_3: brown metal cylinder (behind or front)
- obj_4: red metal cube (front-left or right)
- obj_5: brown metal cube (right side)
- obj_6: brown metal sphere (center)
- obj_7: cyan rubber sphere (center-right)
- obj_8: cyan rubber cylinder (front or left)

From the images, I can estimate positions:
- obj_1 (gray cube): far back or front-center
- obj_2 (green cube): middle area
- obj_3 (brown cylinder): behind or front
- obj_4 (red cube): front area
- obj_5 (brown cube): right side
- obj_6 (brown sphere): center
- obj_7 (cyan sphere): right-center
- obj_8 (cyan cylinder): left or front
